summary: graph_bootstrap.bootstrap_concepts crashes on v2 three-tier taxonomy (binds dict as definition)
description:
graph_bootstrap.py::bootstrap_concepts crashes on the v2 three-tier taxonomy.

Repro: `python3 scripts/graph_bootstrap.py`
  ... Bootstrapping concepts ...
  sqlite3.ProgrammingError: Error binding parameter 5: type 'dict' is not supported

Root cause: bootstrap_concepts (scripts/graph_bootstrap.py ~L86-105) assumes the
flat v1 taxonomy shape data["concepts"][category] = {concept_id: definition_str}:

    for category, concepts in data.get("concepts", {}).items():
        for concept_id, definition in concepts.items():
            upsert_node(..., definition=definition)   # definition expected to be str

But concepts/taxonomy.toml is now the v2 THREE-TIER hierarchy with
[concepts.DOMAIN.FAMILY] sections, so data["concepts"]["cosmology"]["divine_structure"]
= {emanation_hierarchy: "...", ...}. The inner loop therefore yields
concept_id="divine_structure", definition={...a dict...}, and upsert_node binds
that dict to the `definition` column → ProgrammingError (parameter 5 = definition).
main() calls bootstrap_concepts at ~L219, so the whole graph bootstrap aborts
before bootstrap_chunks runs.

Context: concept nodes / families are now owned by scripts/sync_taxonomy.py
(taxonomy.toml header + docs/concept-hierarchy/design.md §4,§6). So
bootstrap_concepts is largely superseded.

Discovered while landing the Mandaean corpus (todo:73c83a22): graph_bootstrap
could not be run end-to-end; worked around by invoking only bootstrap_chunks().

Fix options (decision needed):
(1) Remove bootstrap_concepts from graph_bootstrap and delegate concept/family
    nodes to sync_taxonomy.py — graph_bootstrap then only does tradition + chunk
    nodes + BELONGS_TO. Cleanest if sync_taxonomy is the single source of truth.
(2) Update bootstrap_concepts to walk the three-tier [concepts.DOMAIN.FAMILY]
    nesting (one extra level) if graph_bootstrap is meant to remain self-sufficient.
Also sanity-check apply_schema(schema.sql) against the current v3_006 migration
state while in here.

Regression test: a test that runs graph_bootstrap (or bootstrap_concepts) against
the real taxonomy.toml without raising, OR asserts concept-node creation is
delegated to sync_taxonomy.
